WR-2026-057 · SCHEMA 1.1

Flashpoint

THREAT INTELLIGENCE · TIER 2 · CHALLENGER
B
76 / 100Composite
0CVEs 12mo
12dMean Time To Patch
KEV CLEARPACK · 1 MODULE

The Wang Report Take

After acquiring Echosec and Risk Based Security, Flashpoint has become the most comprehensive dark web and criminal forum intelligence provider. Particularly strong for APAC criminal network monitoring and financial fraud threat intelligence.
— The Wang Report

How We Got To B

Five dimensions. Same weights the scorecard algorithm uses.
MEAN TIME TO PATCH
30%
12 DAYS
85
└ Patch cadence of 12 days — strong response window.
CISA KEV EXPOSURE
25%
0 ACTIVE
100
└ Zero active KEVs. Not currently on CISA's active-exploitation radar.
ZERO-DAY ACTIVITY
20%
0 IN WINDOW
100
└ No observed in-the-wild zero-days in the window.
CRITICAL CVE RATIO
15%
0 / 0
90
└ No critical CVEs in the window — clean severity profile.
YEAR-OVER-YEAR TREND
10%
NEUTRAL
50
└ Trend data not yet in the schema. Neutral placeholder.
(85×0.30) + (100×0.25) + (100×0.20) + (90×0.15) + (50×0.10) = 76 → GRADE B

Incident Behaviour

The scorecard part no algorithm produces.
REACT B
